name: 4-Day Tour: Tangier → Chefchaouen → Fes → Meknes/Volubilis → Marrakech

seo.title: 4-Day Tangier to Marrakech Tour — Chefchaouen, Fes, Meknes, Volubilis | Authentic Morocco Tours
seo.description: Private 4-day tour from Tangier to Marrakech: Chefchaouen (Blue City), medieval Fes (official guide), Meknes, Volubilis (UNESCO), Marrakech. Transport, accommodation, guide included.

intro: This 4-day tour from Tangier crosses the most fascinating regions of northern and central Morocco: the blue city of Chefchaouen in the Rif mountains, the thousand-year-old medina of Fes (official guide included), the imperial city of Meknes and the Roman ruins of Volubilis, before arriving in Marrakech.
